def positive_python_perf_layer_string_handling_lowercase_compare_allocates():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_string_handling_lowercase_compare_allocates"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: String handling. Flag lower()/upper() equality checks where casefold once or normalized keys avoid repeated allocation."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
